text.title: PM Tools Comparison Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the PM Tools Comparison methodology end-to-end.

step.name: design-poc
step.action: Define PoC scope: 10 working days, 3-5 evaluator personas.

step.name: run-poc
step.action: Run PoC for >=10 working days per tool; log observations daily.

step.name: score-and-tco
step.action: Score per criterion with evidence; compute 3-year TCO per tool.

step.name: publish-adr
step.action: Pick highest weighted (or document override); capture dissents; publish ADR.
